channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Panicked Democrats scramble to offset back-to-back-to-back redistricting blows
item.description: Republican chances of keeping the House are surging, as panicked Democrats scramble to offset back-to-back-to-back redistricting blows. Why it matters...

item.title: After a year of whiplash, U.S. jobs market is stabilizing
item.description: Data: Bureau of Labor Statistics; Chart: Neil Irwin/Axios The U.S. labor market has found its footing: A yearlong pattern of whipsawing between job ga...

item.title: Democrats' disaster scenario: Lawmakers despondent over "sickening" Virginia ruling
item.description: House Democrats fell into a state of anguish on Friday after the Virginia Supreme Court struck down a congressional map that would have netted them as...

item.title: Canvas outage delays college finals across the country
item.description: Universities across the country are rescheduling or canceling finals after a cyberattack shut down a learning platform used by thousands of schools fo...
